agent_log.output_summary: Wrote idempotent apps/api/src/db/seed.ts (demo user demo@example.com/demo1234, 15 shared recipients, 4 campaigns covering all states; sent campaign has open_rate=5/8). Added 'seed' script to apps/api/package.json. Verified two consecutive runs produce identical state. All 78 backend tests still pass; build + lint clean.

Two surgical polish edits per F5 code-reviewer LOW items. (1) apps/web/src/components/CampaignActions.tsx line 213: renamed Modal prop destroyOnClose -> destroyOnHidden (AntD v5 deprecation gone from test output). (2) apps/web/src/lib/api.ts response interceptor: replaced pathname.startsWith('/login') with exact equality, extended guard to also skip /register so 401 mid-register-auto-login doesn't boot the user out of the form. Build clean, lint 0 errors, 8/8 web tests pass. Marked both tech-debt entries RESOLVED IN F6 (kept for audit trail).

Walked every line of ASSIGNMENT.md against the codebase. 64 items audited: 56 met, 8 fully-justified partials (all README/finalize-step deferrals already enumerated in spec-final-polish.md), 0 unmet. Verified 78 backend + 8 frontend = 86 tests pass. Top remaining work for finalize step: F3-F5 retrospective in README, CI badge, known-limitations section, architecture diagram, submission walkthrough at top, seed reference in quick-start, POST /recipient -> /recipients deviation callout. Flipping workflow status to verified.
